creator: mva@FreeBSD.org
text:
After investigating the GNATS data, this can be probably realized for around 50 percent of the imported accounts, maybe a bit more or less. Lots of entries are ambiguous (due to the From: lines varying slightly) or broken in ways that we can't automatically extract the name from them.

Additionally, a real name or user name is not mandatory, so users having deleted it on purpose should not be updated.
